description: Pinned fixtures for the docent hermetic harness. Each entry is a film spec committed under films/. The harness runs the engine cascade end-to-end and asserts the output is a valid video of the expected shape. The fixtures cover the proven domains — math wiki, software PR, math proof, literature. `docent preflight` runs the harness on the smallest fixture as the end-to-end gate; `docent hermetic` (no fixture id) runs the full gallery.

fixtures.subject: Linear algebra — the dot product as the keystone operation
Robert Frost — Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening, a close reading
